description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image and a global before_script installing nodejs, nodejs-npm, git, python, g++ and make, then runs npm i to install dependencies. Cache the node_modules directory per project using the key ${CI_PROJECT_ID} and define the stages build, checkstyle, test, coverage and deploy. In the build stage add a build job (tagged aireach) that executes npm run build and npm run build-contracts and publishes the resulting build/ directory as an artifact. In the checkstyle stage add a checkstyle job (tagged aireach) that runs npm run linting, and in the test stage add a test job (tagged aireach) that runs npm test. In the deploy stage add a deploy job (tagged aireach) that runs only on the develop branch, with its own before_script installing nodejs, nodejs-npm, git, python, g++, make and openssh-client, runs node scripts/exec/retriever and node scripts/exec/markdown_parser, sets up an SSH private key from $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, adds the key to the ssh-agent, adds the host 188.166.218.211 to known_hosts, and then copies the compiled contracts and documentation to the remote server via scp.
